item.description: made this kick the other day (im not 100% sure thats the final sample, i kinda doubt it) lowkey might buy bitwig cos my trial’s expired, and i wanna start making my own sample pack :3 also also bought kaitwillows.net but i have to figure out how/what to host on there.

item.title: inabakumori - Lagtrain ラグトレイン and others
item.description: i played osu (🤢🤮) for the first time in a while and i forgot how much i loved this type of music.

item.title: blip: keshi - get it (cover) 1
item.description: this genre of music is severely harder than i though .

item.title: spotify uses exclusively genAI for their lofi playlists
item.description: hihi, i’m gonna sound like a conspiracy theorist, but this is kinda obvious, only if you’re intentionally looking for it this is spotify’s official “lofi beats” playlist: all of the “artists” on this playlist have a very basic third person bio, if any, that just says where they’re from and that they...

item.title: fuck spotify
item.description: hihi idk, i feel like spotify keeps getting shittier for the following reasons: spotify player usually doesn’t play the ends of songs properly they use ai for their lofi playlists this, presumably, lets them avoid paying the already disgustingly low streaming royalties to real artists.

item.title: stream
item.description: spotify is becoming more and more sloppified every day, so feel free to listen to “kaitwillows” however you please :).

item.title: music roadmap
item.description: in progress: smallForYou walmartMilkoi plans keshi - get it (cover) walmartMilkoi but the WannaCry lead instead - just some edm song the skooby song (first shows up at 0:12, i just wanna transcribe it) some song about insomnic tendancies .
